title: Point-to-Area Representativeness
description: The probability that a point measurement lies within a specific range of area-average (volume-average) concentration value.

definitions.definition: The probability that a point measurement lies within a specific range of area-average (volume-average) concentration value
definitions.sources:
- Nappo [RD14]
- RD14: Nappo, C.J., Caneill J.Y., Furman R.W., Gifford F.A., Kaimal J.C., Kramer M.L., Lockhart T.J., Pendergast M.M, Pielke R.A., Randerson D., Shreffler J.H., and Wyngaard J.C., The Workshop on the Representativeness of Meteorological Observations, June 1981, Boulder, CO, Bull. Am. Meteorol. Soc. 63, 761-764, 1982.
